title: Battle of Bilbringi (disambiguation)
content:
The '''Battle of Bilbringi''' can refer to:

'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
*A [[Battle of Bilbringi (6 ABY)|battle]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]
*A [[Raid on Bilbringi|raid]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]
*The [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]] in 9 ABY
*A [[Battle of Bilbringi (10 ABY)|battle]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]

'''[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'''
*The [[Battle of Bilbringi (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Bilbringi]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]
*A [[Attack on the Bilbringi system|battle]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]
*The [[Second Battle of Bilbringi]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]
